message.entry: Trailing input arguments must occur in name-value pairs.
The length of ''BinEdges'' must be one longer than ''BinCounts'' when ''BinCountsMode'' is ''manual''.
''BinCounts'' cannot be set if any of ''NumBins'',''BinWidth'', ''BinMethod'', or ''BinLimits'' is set, and it must have length equal to length(BinEdges)-1.
With {0} data, bin edges must be {0}.
With {0} data, bin limits must be {0}.
''countdensity'' and ''pdf'' normalization are not supported with datetime or duration data.
''integers'' bin method is not supported with datetime or duration data.
''{0}'' bin method is not supported with duration data.
When ''BinCountsMode'' is set to ''manual'', ''BinCounts'' must be set.
When ''BinLimitsMode'' is set to ''manual'', ''BinEdges'' or ''BinLimits'' must be set.
BinEdges must be a vector of length greater than or equal to 2.
When changing Data, old and new values must be both numeric, or must have the same class.
FaceColor must be ''none'' when ''DisplayStyle'' is set to ''stairs''.
BinMethod cannot be set to ''manual''.
Bin width must be a positive and finite scalar.
{0} input is not a valid color.
Bin edges must be a datetime vector with at least two elements if the data is a datetime array.
Bin limits must be a sorted finite {0} vector with two elements if the data is {0}.
With datetime data, bin width must be a scalar duration or calendarDuration.
With duration data, bin width must be a scalar duration.
Bin edges must be a duration vector with at least two elements if the data is a duration array.
''BinEdges'' input cannot be followed by any of ''NumBins'',''BinWidth'', ''BinMethod'', or ''BinLimits''.
Bin edges must be a row vector with {0,number,integer} elements when bin counts has {1,number,integer} elements.
When X input is non-empty, BinCounts cannot be set.
When ''BinCountsMode'' is set to ''auto'', ''BinCounts'' cannot be set.
When ''BinLimitsMode'' is set to ''auto'', ''BinEdges'' or ''BinLimits'' cannot be set.
With numeric data, bin edges must be numeric.
With numeric data, bin width must be numeric.
With numeric data, bin limits must be numeric.
With numeric data, bin method must be ''auto'', ''scott'', ''fd'', ''integers'', ''sqrt'', or ''sturges''.
Orientation is not supported for datetime or duration data when there are non-histogram objects in the axes.
Changing the ''Orientation'' value is not supported for histograms with datetime or duration data in two y-axes.
{0} cannot be set when BinCountsMode is ''manual''.
Bin edges must be a sorted datetime vector that does not contain NaTs.
Bin edges must be a sorted duration vector that does not contain NaNs.
''{0}'' is not a supported bin method for {1} data.
''Categories'' is not supported when X input is numeric or logical.
''{0}'' normalization option is not supported for datetime or duration data.
{0} is not supported when BinCountsMode is ''manual''.
Horizontal orientation is not supported for histogram in polar coordinates.
Invalid 'BinEdges' value for histogram in polar coordinates. Difference between maximum and minimum values must not be greater than 2*pi.
Invalid 'BinLimits' value for histogram in polar coordinates. Specify a 2-element vector of values that differ by no more than 2*pi.
Orientation of box charts
Relative width of individual boxes
Outlier marker displacement
Median comparison display
Number of bins
Binning algorithm
Width of bins
Histogram display style
Toggle summary display of data for undisplayed categories
Orientation of bars
Bin edges
Value
